content.css: .navigation.tabs-top.main { display: flex !important; flex-wrap: nowrap !important; overflow-x: auto !important; overflow-y: hidden !important; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; scrollbar-width: thin;}.navigation.tabs-top.main > .tablink { flex: 1 1 120px !important; min-width: 120px !important; box-sizing: border-box;}

widgets.css: .nodes.inputs, .nodes.outputs { width: 30%; flex: 0 0 30%; } canvas { flex: 1 1 auto; } .patchbaynode-container { white-space: normal; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; height: auto; min-height: var(--line-height); } .patchbaynode-container > label { white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-word; text-overflow: clip; }

widgets.label: snap all spot pos to bpm

widgets.css: .nodes.inputs, .nodes.outputs { width: 30%; flex: 0 0 30%; } canvas { flex: 1 1 auto; } .patchbaynode-container { white-space: normal; overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; height: auto; min-height: var(--line-height); } .patchbaynode-container > label { white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-word; text-overflow: clip; }

widgets.onTouch: if (locals.touching) { locals.touching = false; send("/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_reds/record", 0) } else { locals.touching = true; send("/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_reds/record", 1); set("loop_reds_origin", value) }

if (event.type === 'stop') {  if (locals.dragging) {    locals.dragging = false;    send('/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_1/record', 0);    updateCanvas('loop_canvas_spot_1');  }  return;} if (typeof event.offsetX !== 'number' || typeof event.offsetY !== 'number') return; var w = this.width || 280, h = this.height || 280; var cx = Math.max(0, Math.min(w, event.offsetX)); var cy = Math.max(0, Math.min(h, event.offsetY)); var pan = (cx / w) * 65534 - 32767; var tilt = ((h - cy) / h) * 65534 - 32767; if (!isFinite(pan) || !isFinite(tilt)) return; if (event.type === 'start') {   locals.dragging = true;   locals.dragPath = [[cx, cy]];   send('/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_1/record', 1);   send('/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_1/input', pan, tilt);   updateCanvas('loop_canvas_spot_1'); } else if (event.type === 'move' && locals.dragging) {   locals.dragPath.push([cx, cy]);   send('/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_1/input', pan, tilt);   updateCanvas('loop_canvas_spot_1'); }
widgets.onDraw: if (getVar('this', 'clearDragPath')) {  setVar('this', 'clearDragPath', false);  locals.dragPath = [];} var cw = width, ch = height; ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)'; ctx.lineWidth = 1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cw/2, 0); ctx.lineTo(cw/2, ch); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, ch/2); ctx.lineTo(cw, ch/2); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cw/2, ch/2, 3, 0, 2*Math.PI); ctx.fill(); var path; if (locals.dragPath && locals.dragPath.length > 0) {   path = locals.dragPath; } else {   var xs = get('loop_canvas_spot_1_samples_x') || [];   var ys = get('loop_canvas_spot_1_samples_y') || [];   path = [];   var nn = Math.min(xs.length, ys.length);   for (var i = 0; i < nn; i++) {     path.push([((xs[i] + 32767) / 65534) * cw, ch - ((ys[i] + 32767) / 65534) * ch]);   } } if (path.length > 1) {   ctx.strokeStyle = '#4af'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;   ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(path[0][0], path[0][1]);   for (var i = 1; i < path.length; i++) ctx.lineTo(path[i][0], path[i][1]);   ctx.stroke(); } if (path.length > 0) {   ctx.fillStyle = '#fc0'; ctx.beginPath();   ctx.arc(path[0][0], path[0][1], 6, 0, 2*Math.PI); ctx.fill(); }

widgets.onTouch: if (event.type === 'stop') {  if (locals.dragging) {    locals.dragging = false;    send('/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_2/record', 0);    updateCanvas('loop_canvas_spot_2');  }  return;} if (typeof event.offsetX !== 'number' || typeof event.offsetY !== 'number') return; var w = this.width || 280, h = this.height || 280; var cx = Math.max(0, Math.min(w, event.offsetX)); var cy = Math.max(0, Math.min(h, event.offsetY)); var pan = (cx / w) * 65534 - 32767; var tilt = ((h - cy) / h) * 65534 - 32767; if (!isFinite(pan) || !isFinite(tilt)) return; if (event.type === 'start') {   locals.dragging = true;   locals.dragPath = [[cx, cy]];   send('/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_2/record', 1);   send('/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_2/input', pan, tilt);   updateCanvas('loop_canvas_spot_2'); } else if (event.type === 'move' && locals.dragging) {   locals.dragPath.push([cx, cy]);   send('/gen/LoopGenerator/loop_spot_pos_2/input', pan, tilt);   updateCanvas('loop_canvas_spot_2'); }
widgets.onDraw: if (getVar('this', 'clearDragPath')) {  setVar('this', 'clearDragPath', false);  locals.dragPath = [];} var cw = width, ch = height; ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)'; ctx.lineWidth = 1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cw/2, 0); ctx.lineTo(cw/2, ch); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, ch/2); ctx.lineTo(cw, ch/2); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cw/2, ch/2, 3, 0, 2*Math.PI); ctx.fill(); var path; if (locals.dragPath && locals.dragPath.length > 0) {   path = locals.dragPath; } else {   var xs = get('loop_canvas_spot_2_samples_x') || [];   var ys = get('loop_canvas_spot_2_samples_y') || [];   path = [];   var nn = Math.min(xs.length, ys.length);   for (var i = 0; i < nn; i++) {     path.push([((xs[i] + 32767) / 65534) * cw, ch - ((ys[i] + 32767) / 65534) * ch]);   } } if (path.length > 1) {   ctx.strokeStyle = '#4af'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;   ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(path[0][0], path[0][1]);   for (var i = 1; i < path.length; i++) ctx.lineTo(path[i][0], path[i][1]);   ctx.stroke(); } if (path.length > 0) {   ctx.fillStyle = '#fc0'; ctx.beginPath();   ctx.arc(path[0][0], path[0][1], 6, 0, 2*Math.PI); ctx.fill(); }

widgets.label: ▲
widgets.onValue: if (value) { var v = get('chan/spot_1/pantilt/offset'); var s = get('spot_1_nudge_step'); set('chan/spot_1/pantilt/offset', [v[0], v[1] + s]); }

widgets.label: ▼
widgets.onValue: if (value) { var v = get('chan/spot_1/pantilt/offset'); var s = get('spot_1_nudge_step'); set('chan/spot_1/pantilt/offset', [v[0], v[1] - s]); }

widgets.label: ◀
widgets.onValue: if (value) { var v = get('chan/spot_1/pantilt/offset'); var s = get('spot_1_nudge_step'); set('chan/spot_1/pantilt/offset', [v[0] - s, v[1]]); }

widgets.label: ▶
widgets.onValue: if (value) { var v = get('chan/spot_1/pantilt/offset'); var s = get('spot_1_nudge_step'); set('chan/spot_1/pantilt/offset', [v[0] + s, v[1]]); }
